rewritten_requirements: The system shall skip non-meaningful elements like spaces or comments.
The system shall ignore empty spaces and line breaks at the beginning.
The system shall skip all characters from // to the end of the line.
The system shall continue skipping content until the end of a block comment (*/).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system reads through a piece of code and skips anything that is not meaningful, such as spaces or comments.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system reads through a piece of code and skips anything that is not meaningful, such as spaces or comments.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: At the beginning, it ignores empty spaces and line breaks.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At the beginning, it ignores empty spaces and line breaks.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If it finds a line comment (starting with //), it skips everything on that line until it reaches the end.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it finds a line comment (starting with //), it skips everything on that line until it reaches the end.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If it finds a block comment (starting with /*), it continues skipping everything until the comment is closed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it finds a block comment (starting with /*), it continues skipping everything until the comment is closed.
